title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Croma Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Croma Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Croma Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Croma Digital Technologies:
Croma Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Croma Digital Technologies!
